commands.review_summary:
The branch scopes the WebChat attach button to its closest composer file input, sets the control to `type="button"`, adds a chat view regression test, and records a changelog fix.

Reproducibility: no. not at high confidence: the linked issue reports a Chrome/Windows no-op and source inspection confirms current main uses a brittle document-wide hidden-input click path, but this review did not exercise a real browser file picker.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof or maintainer validation, not a narrow code defect for ClawSweeper repair.

target.title: fix(webchat): scope attachment button input
target.body:
## Summary
- route the visible WebChat attachment button to the file input inside its own composer instead of using a document-wide query
- mark the toolbar control as type=button so it cannot accidentally submit surrounding forms
- add coverage for the visible button-to-hidden-input activation path

## Verification
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts CHANGELOG.md
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- git diff --check

## Not Run
- Live Chrome/Windows native file-picker smoke; this environment is headless/Linux.

Fixes openclaw/openclaw#47983
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
